result.summary: Two visual issues identified including an empty header button container and overlapping text elements in the lower fold.

issues.description: An empty solid yellow button container is present in the top-right header area without any text or icon.
issues.suggestion: Add the appropriate action text label such as 'Join Now' or 'Log In' to the header button.

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' navigation overlay is visually overlapping the promotional disclaimer legal text, reducing readability.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the z-index, spacing, or background container opacity to separate the scroll indicator from the fine print.
